_comment: The overworld showcase: one forged custom cartridge on the dmg/cgb/agb costumes of the one machine. Forge it first — e.g. `Puck.Demo --forge-volley volley.gbc` (or any --forge-* output) — then `Puck.Demo --run docs/examples/overworld.json`. Parse-validation does not check the romPath; the run path does.
